# `PreventIRQ`

**Systems:** MOS6502, X16, MEGA65  
**Parameters:** `—`

---

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<p>Prevents interrupts from triggering<br>
<code>
  PreventiIRQ();
  // same as
  asm(" sei");
</code>


</div>
